parts.text: Autonomous agents open pull requests now. The good ones are green. The rest just look green.
mergegate puts one gate in front of main. Spec, build, tests, checks — or it does not merge.
An agent opens a pull request. mergegate runs every gate, sees a missing spec and a broken test, and blocks it. The agent fixes it properly — and only then does the gate go green.
mergegate. Provably done, or it doesn't touch main. From deemwar.

lines: Type "# one gate guards main — four pillars, defined per repo"
Type "# an autonomous agent just pushed a PR at main"
Type "# no spec, tests red -> BLOCKED. now the agent does it right..."
Type "mg check ; echo exit=$? -- CI lets the merge through"

captions.text: Four pillars, defined per repo — spec, build, tests, checks.
Agent PR: missing spec + broken test → ✘ BLOCKED.
Fixed properly, spec referenced → ✔ PASS, exit 0.
